Here are the top recent developments for Crusoe Energy (all from March 2026):

**1. Form Energy iron-air battery deal (March 24)**
Crusoe signed an agreement with Form Energy for 12 gigawatt-hours of iron-air batteries to power its AI data centers. This is a notable bet on a relatively novel battery chemistry to solve the power-density problem for AI infrastructure.
